APPROVE
The bead is an investigation/synthesis with no explicit acceptance criteria. The findings document promotes the five per-task divergence beads to a profile-level conclusion, validates the hypothesis with 7/7 medium-task failures plus short-task and Sonnet cross-checks, identifies the gating action (reasoning=medium → low), and cites concrete code locations for the stall guard and configuration. success
The bead is an investigation/synthesis with no explicit acceptance criteria. The findings document promotes the five per-task divergence beads to a profile-level conclusion, validates the hypothesis with 7/7 medium-task failures plus short-task and Sonnet cross-checks, identifies the gating action (reasoning=medium → low), and cites concrete code locations for the stall guard and configuration. Scope and content match the bead description.
